allow: PowerShell(python -c "import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET; p=r'DATA WEB TMQ.docx'; z=zipfile.ZipFile\(p\); root=ET.fromstring\(z.read\('word/document.xml'\)\); ns='{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}'; print\('\\n'.join\(''.join\(t.text or '' for t in para.iter\(ns+'t'\)\) for para in root.iter\(ns+'p'\)\)\)")
